top3.sql:
WITH sales_by_year AS (
    SELECT 
        ss_customer_sk AS customer_sk,
        d_year AS year,
        SUM((ss_ext_list_price - ss_ext_wholesale_cost - ss_ext_discount_amt + ss_ext_sales_price) / 2) AS store_year_total
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_year IN (2001, 2002)
    GROUP BY ss_customer_sk, d_year
    HAVING SUM((ss_ext_list_price - ss_ext_wholesale_cost - ss_ext_discount_amt + ss_ext_sales_price) / 2) > 0
),
